summary: Web app called 'RDXper' for generating academic research papers based on user-provided topics. Features user authentication, AI-powered research paper generation following academic structure (8000-10000 words), outline creation with user confirmation, and paper download capability.
architectural_notes: AI/LLM integration needed for research paper generation (8000-10000 words)
User authentication and session management required
Document generation and formatting engine for academic papers
Statistical analysis visualization capabilities (Chi-square, ANOVA, charts/tables)
PDF generation library integration required for document export

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication system with sign-in and login functionality using Internet Identity
Create a research topic input form where authenticated users can enter their research topic
Display generated outline to user and present a confirmation dialog asking whether they have content for the research paper and whether the AI should generate it fully
Include Author field in the generated paper using the authenticated user's name or principal identifier
Implement research paper download functionality allowing users to download the complete generated paper in a standard document format
Design a professional and academic visual theme for RDXper with a clean, scholarly aesthetic suitable for research and academic work, using typography and colors that convey credibility and focus
Remove the logo image element (img tag) from the button component in the header navigation located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]/img[1]

Modify the downloadHelper.ts formatPaper function to structure the downloaded document according to the user-specified template format, including proper document formatting, section hierarchy, and styling conventions that match the reference template provided by the user
Replace the current text file download in DownloadButton.tsx with PDF generation functionality that exports the research paper as a PDF document

Format the PDF document to match the structure and styling of the uploaded research paper template, preserving the document hierarchy, section formatting, typography conventions, and layout patterns from the reference template
Update the downloadHelper.ts utility to support PDF generation while maintaining the existing formatPaper function's template-based formatting logic

new_feature_requests.summary: Download research paper as PDF format instead of current format
